card_description: Jimmy Carter is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick synthesizes investigative journalism (*Playboy*, *Rolling Stone*) to conclude that Nixon was a mere "puppet" of a larger technocratic/financial conglomerate."
